calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Notice And Subpoena, And For Protective Order Prohibiting Deposition Of Percepta Llcs Person(S) Most Knowledgeable
Off Calendar Sep-11-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE: Atty. DAVID N. BARRY. ESQ. of The Barry Law Firm, Tel No. 310-684-5859 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. CHARLES F. HARLOW, ESQ. of Schnader Harrison Segal & Lewis LLP, Tel No. 415-364-6731 appearing for the Defendant Ford Motor Company.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court modified its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: Defendant Ford Company's Motion to Quash Deposition Notice and subpoena and for a protective rder prohibiting deposition of Percepta LLC's most knowledgeable is denied. There is inadequate showing that the requested discovery is unreasonable, oppressive or intended to harass the Defendant. To the contrary, the deposition sought is of a witness who allegedly was directly involved in the actions about which Plaintiff complains. As to Plaintiff's alleged failure to provide Defendant with a copy of the Florida subpoena, such failure can easily be corrected and, in any case, is not a basis for issuing the protective order sought by Defendant. The court awards a sanction of $1,000.00 to plaintiff and against Ford Motor Company payable within 30 days of the court's order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EHG)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Deposition Notice And Subpoena, And For Protective Order Prohibiting Deposition Of Percepta Llcs Person(S) Most Knowledgeable
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Continued To Sep-11-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. DAVID N. BARRY, ESQ. of the Barry Law Firm, Tel No. 310-684-5859 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. CHARLES F. HARLOW, ESQ. of Schnader Harrison Segal & Lewis LLP, Tel No. 415-364-6731 appearing for Defendant Ford Motor Company.

Defense counsel does not stipulate to this matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne. Matter argued by counsel. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S Motion To Quash Deposition Notice And Subpoena, And For Protective Order Prohibiting Deposition Of Percepta LLC's Person(s) Most Knowledgeable is continued to September 11, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
